summary: The diff shows that REQ-33 has been fully implemented. The OrderForm.tsx file was modified to include a clickable State Bank of India PhonePe QR code (IMG_3581-1.jpeg) with proper UPI deep linking functionality. The QR code is positioned after product selection and quantity fields, and the PhonePe deep link opens the mobile app when clicked. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the file summary evidence.
